destinations.evidence: Alloy EVM copies spc_calls only from Legacy and EIP-1559 into TxEnv; Scheduled destructures spc_calls as ignored and leaves defaults, while EIP-2930/4844/7702 constructors do not set spc_calls.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in alloy-evm dependency: TxEnv conversion carries SPC calls only for the supported consensus transaction types and defaults the rest.
rationale: The candidate is orthogonal to receipts but present in this packet; the current invariant is preserved as stated by the source candidate.
statement: Recovered Legacy and EIP-1559 transactions must transfer their spc_calls into TxEnv, while EIP-2930, EIP-4844, EIP-7702, Scheduled, and RPC-generated call environments default spc_calls to empty.
suggested_falsification_tests: Convert recovered Legacy, EIP-1559, Scheduled, EIP-2930, EIP-4844, and EIP-7702 transactions to TxEnv and assert spc_calls are copied only for Legacy/EIP-1559.
summary: TxEnv receives SPC calls only from supported transaction types.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Focused TxEnv conversion unit test in alloy-evm.
title: Execution TxEnv receives SPC calls only from supported transaction types
